title: RavneSMP
description: This modpack is required to play on the RavneSMP Minecraft server. It includes essential mods that enhance your gameplay experience on our server.
body:
### Key Features:


**Enhanced Performance:** Optimized mods to ensure smooth gameplay.

**Unique Gameplay Elements:** Adds new mechanics and features exclusive to RavneSMP.

**Community Enhancements:** Mods that improve social interactions and community building within the server.

### How to use?


**Download Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/app

**Install the Modpack:** View [How to install?](https://pastebin.com/NsiS1GT1)

**Join the Server**: Connect to RavneSMP and enjoy the enhanced gameplay!

For a seamless gaming experience, make sure to follow these steps and join our vibrant community. 

**Happy gaming!**
